name: io.github.cpenniman12/text2sql-mcp
title: text2sql
description: Ask any SQL database questions in natural language. The agent explores the schema, writes SQL, executes it against the real DB, and self-corrects on errors — no RAG, no schema descriptions, no pre-computed embeddings. SQLite, Postgres, MySQL, Snowflake, and BigQuery via install extras; Anthropic or OpenAI models.

environmentVariables.name: TEXT2SQL_DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: SQLAlchemy connection URL, e.g. sqlite:///mydb.db or postgresql://user:pass@host/db

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key (required if using the default Anthropic model)

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (required when TEXT2SQL_MODEL is set to an openai:* model)
